case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. SARA KERNITZ

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KERNITZ, SARA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KERNITZ, SARA $2,549.32 PRINCIPAL, $1,426.32 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,200.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
